title: issue — one weekly newsletter
description: The complete newsletter, as data: the window, the included articles, and the assembled body — written only by tools/assemble_issue.py, never by hand (OVERVIEW rule 4). May only reference included articles (rule 3, enforced in validate.py and refused at assembly). A file copy of the body is an on-demand export, never stored state.

articles.description: The included articles this issue carries, in run order.

body.description: The assembled newsletter markdown — written by tools/assemble_issue.py after its closure checks; regenerate after any change. A final issue must carry one (enforced in validate.py).
